content.problemStatement:
Sequential or Linear search is a method to search for an element in an array. 

The algorithm for sequential is very simple and it works on unordered (unsorted) data as well.

To search for an element in an array, initialise an index to the start of the array and iterate it forward till you either reach end of the array or found the element your are looking for.

TaskComplete the implementation of the sequential search algorithm to solve this problem. 

Return the index of the element (1-based) if it exists in the array, else return -1.
